subject: perf(export): use canvas.toBlob directly instead of fetch(dataUrl)
body:
Previous approach for PNG/JPG: html-to-image → data URL → fetch() →
blob. The fetch(dataUrl) round-trips through the browser's network
stack to convert what is already in-memory base64 data.

New approach for all formats: html-to-image → canvas → canvas.toBlob().
This is what the WebP path already did. Now all three formats use the
same direct conversion, avoiding unnecessary Response object creation
and base64 encoding/decoding overhead.

Also drops the toJpeg import since toCanvas + canvas.toBlob('image/jpeg')
handles JPEG encoding natively.

Tags: export, performance
Complexity: 1
Urgency: 1
Impact: internal
Risk: low
Debt: paid
